nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool

nodes.grounding_span: I will stick to having it help me make connections/analyze already published papers

nodes.label: Personal judgment in defining research focus
nodes.grounding_span: I did not use AI to generate my list of research ideas because it is what interests me and where my personal strengths lie

nodes.label: Research efficiency

nodes.label: Personal intellectual ownership
nodes.grounding_span: it is what interests me and where my personal strengths lie that will help me determine my statement

nodes.label: Scientific advancement through novel connections
nodes.grounding_span: be more confident that I am conducting a study on a topic that is not already well-studied

nodes.label: Positive appreciation for AI as research catalyst
nodes.grounding_span: AI is a tool that can be helpful, and it should be embraced as such

nodes.label: Frustration with AI hallucination
nodes.grounding_span: I am cautious about using it because sometimes I have found that it makes up research

nodes.label: Preference for AI in analysis over idea generation
nodes.grounding_span: I will stick to having it help me make connections/analyze already published papers

nodes.label: Context-sensitive judgment — evaluates AI suggestions based on purpose and audience
